scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix NeuraBot" "npm run dev --prefix DashBoard-NeuraBot"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix NeuraBot && npm run build --prefix DashBoard-NeuraBot
scripts.deploy: npm run build && gh-pages -d NeuraBot/dist --dest NeuraBot && gh-pages -d DashBoard-NeuraBot/dist --dest DashBoard-NeuraBot
